commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And I took your sin, the calf which you had made, and burned it with fire, and crushed it, and ground it very small, even until it was as small as dust: and I cast the dust of it into the brook that descended out of the mount. The Scripture designates by this name not only the evil action, but also the propensity to it, the object, matter, occasion, punishment , or victim of sin. He broke the idol in pieces, and then ground it small, Exodus xxxii.
